#### 9.7.16.3. Major-ness supported by Strides
There are two strides involved while accessing a matrix from shared memory:
1. Leading dimension stride (byte offset or absolute address)
2. Stride dimension byte offset

##### 9.7.16.3.1. Leading Dimension Stride: relative offset or absolute address
There are two modes of Leading Dimension Strides as described below.
Bit #52 in theShared memory descriptoris used to distinguish between two modes.

###### 9.7.16.3.1.1. Relative offset mode
In this mode, the leading dimension stride is specified as a relative byte offset between the
columns as explained in the below table.
The leading dimension stride can either be specified as a relative offset between the columns
or as an absolute byte address of next buffer. The leading dimension stride is defined
differently for transposed and non-transposed matrices. The leading dimension stride is defined
as follows for matrices whose element types are normalized to 128-bits:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 15%"/>
<col style="width: 85%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Major-ness</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Definition</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>K-Major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>No-Swizzling: the stride from the first column to the second column
of the 8x2 tile in the 128-bit element type normalized matrix.</p></li>
<li><p>Swizzled layouts: not used, assumed to be 1.</p></li>
</ul>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>MN-Major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Interleave: stride from the first 8 columns to the next 8 columns.</p></li>
<li><p>Swizzled layouts: stride from the first (swizzle-byte-size/16) rows
to the next (swizzle-byte-size/16) rows.</p></li>
</ul>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

###### 9.7.16.3.1.2. Absolute address mode for K dimension being 48B
The`tcgen05.mma`instruction with*K-dimension*of 48B would overflow the 128B
shared memory boundary if the data is packed contiguously.
In this case, the absolute address mode can be used to break up the data in the
shared memory into two chunks such that both these chunks are laid out within
the aligned 128-byte address boundary.
The leading dimension absolute address can point to the second data chunk in the shared memory.

9.7.16.3.1.2.1.Restrictions on the Leading Dimension Absolute Address Stride
Following are the restrictions on the absolute address stride mode:
1. Only 128B swizzle (with 16B atomicity) is supported.
2. Only K-Major mode is supported. That is, the transpose bits(bits #15 and #16) in
  Instruction descriptormust be 0.
3. The matrix base offset must be 0.

##### 9.7.16.3.2. Stride Dimension Byte Offset
The stride dimension byte offset is defined differently for transposed and non-transposed
matrices. The stride dimension byte offset is defined as follows for matrices whose element
types are normalized to 128-bits:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 15%"/>
<col style="width: 85%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Major-ness</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Definition</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>K-Major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>The offset from the first 8 rows to the next 8 rows.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>MN-Major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Interleave: offset from the first row to the next row.</p></li>
<li><p>Swizzled layout: offset from the first 8 columns to the next 8
columns</p></li>
</ul>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

##### 9.7.16.3.3. Canonical Layouts
In terms of[CuTe layouts](https://docs.nvidia.com/cutlass/media/docs/cpp/cute/01_layout.html)
the canonical layout can be expressed as follows:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 4%"/>
<col style="width: 9%"/>
<col style="width: 21%"/>
<col style="width: 66%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Major-
ness</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Swizzling mode</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Canonical Layout without swizzling</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p><a class="reference external" href="https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/blob/bf9da7b76c766d7ee7d536afc77880a4ef1f1156/include/cute/swizzle.hpp">Swizzling</a>
on the previous column</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td rowspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>MN-
major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>No-swizzling or
Interleaved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((T,1,m),(8,k)):((1,T,SBO),(1T,LBO))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;0, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((T,2,m),(8,k)):((1,T,LBO),(2T,SBO))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;1, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((T,4,m),(8,k)):((1,T,LBO),(4T,SBO))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;2, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((T,8,m),(8,k)):((1,T,LBO),(8T,SBO))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;3, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td rowspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>K-
major</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>No-swizzling or
Interleaved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((8,m),(T,2k)):((1T,SBO),(1,LBO))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;0, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((8,m),(T,2k)):((2T,SBO),(1,T))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;1, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((8,m),(T,2k)):((4T,SBO),(1,T))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;2, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128B Swizzling</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>((8,m),(T,2k)):((8T,SBO),(1,T))</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Swizzle&lt;3, 4, 3&gt;</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

where
- T = 128 / sizeof-elements-in-bits
  T represents scale factor which normalizes matrix element types to 128-bits.
- m represents the number of repeating patterns across rows.
- k represents the number of repeating patterns across columns.
Examples
- K-Major, no-swizzling and tf32 type:Figure 188
  
  ![_images/async-warpgroup-k-no-swizzle-tf32.png](images/7fec194baf9c.png)
  
  Figure 188K major, no-swizzling and tf32 type
  
  the strides and related details are as follows:
  Exact layout : Swizzle<0,4,3> o ((8,2),(4,4)):((4,32),(1,64))
  Canonical Layout :Swizzle<0,4,3> o ((8,m),(T,2k)):((1T,SBO),(1,LBO))
  
  <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
  <table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
  <colgroup>
  <col style="width: 63%"/>
  <col style="width: 37%"/>
  </colgroup>
  <thead>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Parameters</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Value</p></th>
  </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>T</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>m</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>k</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>LBO (relative offset)</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64*sizeof(tf32)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>SBO</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32*sizeof(tf32)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of LBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(LBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 16</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of SBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(SBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 8</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>
- K-Major, 32B swizzling and tf32 type:Figure 189
  
  ![_images/async-warpgroup-k-32B-swizzle-tf32.png](images/df7c0091082d.png)
  
  Figure 189K major, 32B swizzling and tf32 type
  
  the strides and related details are as follows:
  Exact layout : Swizzle<1,4,3> o ((8,2),(4,4)):((8,64),(1,4))
  Canonical Layout :Swizzle<1,4,3> o ((8,m),(T,2k)):((2T,SBO),(1,T))
  
  <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
  <table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
  <colgroup>
  <col style="width: 63%"/>
  <col style="width: 37%"/>
  </colgroup>
  <thead>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Parameters</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Value</p></th>
  </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>T</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>m</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>k</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>LBO (relative offset)</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>NA</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>SBO</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64*sizeof(tf32)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of LBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1 (assumed)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of SBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(SBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 16</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>
- MN-Major, no-swizzling and bf16 type:Figure 190
  
  ![_images/async-warpgroup-mn-no-swizzle-bf16.png](images/1779d9f3b018.png)
  
  Figure 190MN major, no-swizzling and bf16 type
  
  the strides and related details are as follows:
  Exact layout : Swizzle<0,4,3> o ((8,1,2),(8,2)):((1,8,64),(8,128))
  Canonical Layout :Swizzle<0,4,3> o ((T,1,m),(8,k)):((1,T,SBO),(1T,LBO))
  
  <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
  <table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
  <colgroup>
  <col style="width: 63%"/>
  <col style="width: 37%"/>
  </colgroup>
  <thead>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Parameters</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Value</p></th>
  </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>T</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>m</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>k</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>LBO (relative offset)</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128*sizeof(bf16)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>SBO</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64*sizeof(bf16)</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of LBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(LBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 16</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of SBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(SBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 8</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>

  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>T</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>m</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>k</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>LBO (relative offset)</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128*sizeof(bf16)</p></td>

  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of SBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(SBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 32</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>

  ![_images/async-warpgroup-mn-64B-swizzle-bf16.png](images/461c54f69a25.png)

  </tr>

  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">

  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>k</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>LBO (relative offset)</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>256*sizeof(bf16)</p></td>

  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of LBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(LBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 32</p></td>
  </tr>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Encoding of SBO in descriptor</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(SBO) &gt;&gt; 4 = 64</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>

#### 9.7.16.4. Matrix Descriptors
There are three kinds of matrix descriptors used by the`tcgen05`family of instructions.

##### 9.7.16.4.1. Shared memory descriptor
The shared memory descriptor describes the properties of multiplicand matrix in shared
memory including its location in the shared memory of the current*CTA*. It is a 64-bit
value contained in a register with the following layout:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 40 Shared memory descriptor layout</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 10%"/>
<col style="width: 12%"/>
<col style="width: 78%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Bit-field</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Size in bits</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Description</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-13</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>matrix-descriptor-encode (Matrix start address)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14-15</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>16-29</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>matrix-descriptor-encode
(<a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-leading-dimension-byte-offset"><span class="std std-ref">Leading dimension byte offset relative</span></a>)</p>
<p>OR</p>
<p>matrix-descriptor-encode
(<a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-leading-dimension-byte-offset"><span class="std std-ref">Leading dimension byte address absolute</span></a>)</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>30-31</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32-45</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>matrix-descriptor-encode
(<a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-stride-dimension-byte-offset"><span class="std std-ref">Stride dimension byte offset</span></a>)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>46-48</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Fixed constant value of 0b001</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>49-51</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Matrix base offset</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>52</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Leading dimension stride mode:
- 0: byte offset relative
- 1: byte address absolute</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>53-60</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Fixed constant value of 0xb00000000</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>61-63</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Specifies the swizzling mode to be used:
0. No swizzling
1. 128-Byte with 32B atomic swizzling
2. 128-Byte swizzling
4. 64-Byte swizzling
6. 32-Byte swizzling</p>
<p>Note: Values 3, 5 and 7 are invalid</p>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

where matrix-descriptor-encode(x) = (x & 0x3FFFF) >> 4
The value of base offset is 0 when the repeating pattern of the specified swizzling mode
starts as per shown inTable 41.

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 41 Starting address of repeating pattern for various swizzling modes</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 31%"/>
<col style="width: 69%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Swizzling mode</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Starting address of the repeating pattern</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128-Byte swizzle</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1024-Byte boundary</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64-Byte swizzle</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>512-Byte boundary</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32-Byte swizzle</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>256-Byte boundary</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

Otherwise, the base offset must be a non-zero value, computed using the following formula:
`base offset = (pattern start addr >> 0x7) & 0x7`
The following must be 16-byte aligned:
1. Matrix start address
2. Leading dimension byte offset
3. Stride dimension byte offset

###### 9.7.16.4.1.1. Target ISA Note
- The byte address mode for the leading dimension stride is supported on`sm_103a`.

##### 9.7.16.4.2. Instruction descriptor
The instruction descriptor describes the shapes, types and other details of all the matrices
and the matrix-multiplication-and-accumulation operation. It is a 32-bit value in registers
and the exact layout is dependent on the MMA-Kind:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 42 Instruction descriptor format for .kind::tf 32, .kind::f 16, .kind::f 8 f 6 f 4 and .kind::i 8</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 7%"/>
<col style="width: 7%"/>
<col style="width: 40%"/>
<col style="width: 11%"/>
<col style="width: 10%"/>
<col style="width: 12%"/>
<col style="width: 14%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Bits</p></th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<p>Size</p>
<p>(bits)</p>
</th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Description</p></th>
<th colspan="4" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Values</p></th>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::tf32</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::f16</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::f8f6f4</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::i8</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p><a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-sparse-matrices-sparsity-selector"><span class="std std-ref">Sparsity selector</span></a>,
if Sparsity is enabled</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Sparsity</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Dense = 0</p>
<p>Sparse = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Saturate for integer types</p></td>
<td colspan="3" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0 (NA)</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>No Saturate = 0
Saturate = 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4-5</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>dtype (Matrix D type)</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>F32 = 1</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>F16 = 0
F32 = 1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>S32 = 2</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>7-9</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>atype (Matrix A type)</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>TF32 = 2</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>F16 = 0</p>
<p>BF16 = 1</p>
</td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>E4M3 = 0
E5M2 = 1
E2M3 = 3
E3M2 = 4
E2M1 = 5</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Unsigned 8b = 0</p>
<p>Signed 8b = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>10-12</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>btype (Matrix B type)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>13</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate A Matrix</p></td>
<td colspan="3" rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>No Negate = 0</p>
<p>Negate = 1</p>
</td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>No Negate = 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>15</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose A Matrix</p></td>
<td colspan="4" rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>No Transpose = 0</p>
<p>Transpose = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>16</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>17-22</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N, Dimension of Matrix B
(3 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N &gt;&gt; 3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>23</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>24-28</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>5</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M, Dimension of Matrix A
(4 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M &gt;&gt; 4</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>29</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>30-31</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Maximum shift while attempting
B matrix -reuse in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.ws</span></code></p></td>
<td colspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>no shift = 0
maximum shift of 8 = 1
maximum shift of 16 = 2
maximum shift of 32 = 3</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 43 Instruction descriptor format for .kind::mxf 8 f 6 f 4</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 11%"/>
<col style="width: 10%"/>
<col style="width: 58%"/>
<col style="width: 21%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Bits</p></th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<p>Size</p>
<p>(bits)</p>
</th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Description</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Values</p></th>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::mxf8f6f4</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Sparsity</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Dense = 0</p>
<p>Sparse = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4-5</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p><a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-mma-scale-factor-b"><span class="std std-ref">Matrix B Scale Factor Data ID</span></a></p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>7-9</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>atype (Matrix A type)</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>E4M3 = 0
E5M2 = 1
E2M3 = 3
E3M2 = 4
E2M1 = 5</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>10-12</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>btype (Matrix B type)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>13</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate A Matrix</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>No Negate = 0</p>
<p>Negate = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>15</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose A Matrix</p></td>
<td rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>No Transpose = 0</p>
<p>Transpose = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>16</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>17-22</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N, Dimension of Matrix B
(3 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N &gt;&gt; 3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>23</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Scale Matrix Type, for both scale_A /
scale_B</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>UE8M0 = 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>24-26</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>27-28</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M, Dimension of Matrix A
(7 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M &gt;&gt; 7</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>29-30</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p><a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-mma-scale-factor-a"><span class="std std-ref">Matrix A Scale Factor Data ID</span></a></p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>31</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 44 Instruction descriptor format for .kind::mxf 4 and .kind::mxf 4 nvf 4</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%"/>
<col style="width: 8%"/>
<col style="width: 47%"/>
<col style="width: 18%"/>
<col style="width: 18%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Bits</p></th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<p>Size</p>
<p>(bits)</p>
</th>
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Description</p></th>
<th colspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Values</p></th>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::mxf4</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>.kind::mxf4nvf4</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Sparsity</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Dense = 0</p>
<p>Sparse = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4-5</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p><a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-mma-scale-factor-b"><span class="std std-ref">Matrix B Scale Factor Data ID</span></a></p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0 or 2</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>7-9</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>atype (Matrix A type)</p></td>
<td colspan="2" rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>E2M1 = 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>10-11</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>btype (Matrix B type)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>12</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>13</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate A Matrix</p></td>
<td colspan="2" rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>No Negate = 0</p>
<p>Negate = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>14</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Negate B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>15</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose A Matrix</p></td>
<td colspan="2" rowspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>No Transpose = 0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>16</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Transpose B Matrix</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>17-22</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N, Dimension of Matrix B
(3 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>N &gt;&gt; 3</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>23</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Scale Matrix Type, for both scale_A /
scale_B</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>UE8M0 = 1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>UE4M3 = 0
UE8M0 = 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>24-26</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>27-28</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M, Dimension of Matrix A
(7 LSBs not included)</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>M &gt;&gt; 7</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>29-30</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p><a class="reference internal" href="#tcgen05-mma-scale-factor-a"><span class="std std-ref">Matrix A Scale Factor Data ID</span></a></p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0 or 2</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>31</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>K Dimension</p></td>
<td colspan="2" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>(Dense K=64 / Sparse K=128) = 0</p>
<p>(Dense K=96) = 1</p>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

##### 9.7.16.4.3. Zero-Column Mask Descriptor
The zero-column mask descriptor is used to generate a mask that specifies which columns of
`B`matrix will have zero value for the MMA operation regardless of the values present in
the shared memory. The total size of the generated mask is N-bits.
A 0-bit in the mask specifies that values of the corresponding column in matrix`B`should
be used for the MMA operation. A 1-bit in the mask specifies 0s must be used for the entire
column for the MMA operation.
The zero-column mask descriptor is a 64-bit value in registers with the following layout:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<caption>Table 45 Zero-Column Mask descriptor layout</caption>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 8%"/>
<col style="width: 13%"/>
<col style="width: 21%"/>
<col style="width: 58%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Bits</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Size (bits)</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Field Name</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Description</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0-7</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Start Count 0 (sc0)</p></td>
<td rowspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Specifies the LSBs that must be skipped</p>
<p>for sub-mask mask-i</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8-15</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Start Count 1 (sc1)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>16-23</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Start Count 2 (sc2)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>24-31</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Start Count 3 (sc3)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>First Span 0 (fs0)</p></td>
<td rowspan="4" style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;">
<p>Specifies the starting value for</p>
<p>sub-mask mask-i</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>33</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>First Span 1 (fs1)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>34</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>First Span 2 (fs2)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>35</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>First Span 3 (fs3)</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>36-38</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Reserved</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>39</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Non-Zero Mask</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Value 0 indicates generated mask will have all 0s
Value 1 indicates the mask has to be generated</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>40-47</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Skip Span</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(Count of consecutive columns where B matrix is used) - 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>48-55</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>8</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Use Span</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>(Count of consecutive columns where 0s ar used) - 1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>56-61</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>6</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Column Shift</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Shifts column by specified amount.
Thus allows MMA on non-0 starting column.
Max shift amount = 16 for M=32
Max shift amount = 32 otherwise</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

The zero-column mask is made up of one or more sub-mask depending on M, as shown in the table:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 5%"/>
<col style="width: 44%"/>
<col style="width: 14%"/>
<col style="width: 17%"/>
<col style="width: 19%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>M</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Zero-Column Mask breakup</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Sub-masks</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>First Span used</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Start Column used</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>128</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Single sub-mask of size N-bits</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask0</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>fs0</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>sc0</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>64</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Two sub-masks, each with size of N/2 bits</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask0, mask1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>fs0, fs1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>sc0, sc1</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>32</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Four sub-masks, each with size of N/4 bits</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask0, mask1
mask2, mask3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>fs0, fs1, fs2,
fs3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>sc0, sc1, sc2,
sc3</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

The following table shows the coverage of the sub-masks across N-dimension:

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
<table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 13%"/>
<col style="width: 24%"/>
<col style="width: 27%"/>
<col style="width: 36%"/>
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th rowspan="2" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Sub-mask</p></th>
<th colspan="3" style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>M</p></th>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>128</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>64</p></th>
<th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>32</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask0</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [0, N-1]</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [0, N/2-1]</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [0, N/4-1]</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask1</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>–</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [N/2, N-1]</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [N/4, N/2-1]</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask2</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>–</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>–</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [N/2, (N/4*3)-1]</p></td>
</tr>
<tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>mask3</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>–</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>–</p></td>
<td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>Columns [(N/4*3), N-1]</p></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

The following examples shows zero-column mask descriptor and their corresponding mask generated:
1. Example 1: M = 128
  Input zero-column mask descriptor:
  
  <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
  <table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">
  <colgroup>
  <col style="width: 20%"/>
  <col style="width: 20%"/>
  <col style="width: 21%"/>
  <col style="width: 15%"/>
  <col style="width: 14%"/>
  <col style="width: 10%"/>
  </colgroup>
  <thead>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Start count</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>First span</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Non-Zero Mask</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Skip Span</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Use Span</p></th>
  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>Shift</p></th>
  </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr style="border: 1px solid #d0d7de;">
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>{0, 0, 0, 0}</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>{0, 0, 0, 0}</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>4</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>3</p></td>
  <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; vertical-align: top;"><p>0</p></td>
  </tr>
  </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>
  
  Output zero-column mask: 0x0.
  As Non-Zero Mask field is 0, the mask is 0x0. All the columns of the matrix`B`will be used
  for the MMA operation.
2. Example 2: M = 128
  Input zero-column mask descriptor:
  
  <div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px;">
  <table border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0;">

  <th style="background-color: #f6f8fa; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d0d7de;"><p>First span</p></th>

3. Example 3: M = 64

  Output mask0: 0b … 0000 111 0000 111
  Output mask1: 0b … 0000 111 0000 11
  Output mask2: 0b … 111 0000 111 00
